summary: Results-driven and motivated professional with a background in client account management, administration, and sales. Proven ability to build rapport, streamline processes, and ensure client satisfaction. Seeking to leverage strong problem-solving skills and a foundation in business operations to drive revenue and contribute to a growth-focused team.

experience.title: Administrative & Client Success Specialist
duties: Managed payroll processing and administrative functions for 10+ small business clients, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.
Served as the primary point of contact for client needs, building trust through clear communication and rapid issue resolution.
Coordinated client onboarding, ensuring a smooth transition and high levels of satisfaction, contributing to client retention.

experience.title: Sales Associate
duties: Developed expertise in customer behavior and market dynamics within a competitive advertising landscape.
Engaged with prospective customers to identify needs and challenges affecting product reception.
Gained insight into developing adaptable sales strategies to meet market demands.

experience.title: Customer Support & Solutions Agent
duties: Ensured high-quality customer interactions through detailed analysis and resolution of inquiries for a high-volume call center.
Addressed and resolved customer concerns regarding billing, add-on products, and payment processing with a consultative approach.
Provided constructive feedback to fellow agents to foster a culture of excellence and improve team-wide performance.

experience.title: Office Assistant
duties: Managed and organized confidential client information, digitizing records to improve retrieval and system integration efficiency.
Facilitated client transition to new systems by ensuring data accessibility and structural integrity.
Maintained high standards of accuracy and met tight deadlines using Excel and internal software.

experience.title: Cleaning Technician Lead
duties: Authored and implemented daily Safety Task Analyses (STAs) to proactively identify and mitigate jobsite hazards, improving team safety.
Served as designated Firewatch, ensuring strict compliance with fire safety protocols during high-risk operations.
Progressively took on greater responsibilities, demonstrating leadership and adaptability in a dynamic environment.
Performed a range of essential site duties including removal of excess concrete, surface sanding for finish quality, and general debris cleanup to maintain a safe and efficient work environment.

certifications: Customer Service Role Preparation, Intuit Academy
